title: NZ School Holidays Travel Tips — How to Beat the Crowds and Save Money
meta_desc: Discover how to save money and avoid crowds during NZ school holidays with our expert travel tips
intro: If you're planning a family trip during the NZ school holidays, you'll know that prices for accommodation and activities can skyrocket. For example, a weekend stay at the Novotel Auckland Ellerslie can cost upwards of $420 per night during peak season. But with some insider knowledge, you can beat the crowds and save money. Here's how to make the most of your family vacation without breaking the bank.

sections.heading: Plan Ahead to Save Money
sections.body: Booking your accommodation and activities well in advance can save you a significant amount of money. For instance, booking a campsite at the Top 10 Holiday Resort in Rotorua 6 months ahead of time can cost around $40 per night, compared to $60 per night if you book just a week in advance. Additionally, consider booking a campervan instead of a hotel room, which can be a cost-effective option for families.

sections.heading: Alternative Destinations
list: Consider visiting the South Island's West Coast instead of Queenstown, where you can find more affordable accommodation options and fewer crowds
Head to the Bay of Islands instead of Auckland, where you can enjoy beautiful beaches and outdoor activities at a lower cost
Visit the Hawke's Bay region, which offers a range of family-friendly activities and affordable accommodation options

sections.heading: Drive Times and Distances
sections.body: When planning your road trip, be sure to factor in drive times and distances to avoid spending too much time in the car. For example, the drive from Auckland to Rotorua takes around 3 hours, while the drive from Queenstown to Wanaka takes around 1 hour. Be sure to check the weather forecast and road conditions before embarking on your journey.

sections.heading: Budgeting for Your Trip
sections.body: Creating a budget for your trip can help you stay on track and avoid overspending. Consider using our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to get an estimate of your expenses. You can also set aside a daily allowance for food and activities to help stick to your budget.

cta.text: Try our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator

sections.heading: Choosing the Right Accommodation
sections.body: When it comes to choosing accommodation, consider what's most important to your family. If you're looking for a luxury experience, you may want to consider a high-end hotel. However, if you're on a budget, a campervan or holiday park may be a more affordable option. Be sure to read reviews and check the amenities before making a decision.

sections.heading: More Travel Tips and Inspiration
sections.body: For more travel tips and inspiration, be sure to check out our destinations page, where you can find information on popular family-friendly destinations around New Zealand.
